comment.label: job-filters.ts
comment.text: Split this module: move the URL-param parsing concern (parseJobFilters and its private sort/apply validators) into a new backend/filter-params.ts. Keep the job predicates and sorting (hasPublicListingSignal, applyBucketsForJob, jobMatchesFilters, sortJobsForDirectory) in backend/job-filters.ts.

cmd: const fs=require('fs');const nf='backend/filter-params.ts';if(!fs.existsSync(nf)){console.error('missing '+nf);process.exit(1)};const s=fs.readFileSync(nf,'utf8');if(!/parseJobFilters/.test(s)){console.error('parseJobFilters not in '+nf);process.exit(1)};const old=fs.readFileSync('backend/job-filters.ts','utf8');if(/function parseJobFilters/.test(old)){console.error('parseJobFilters still in job-filters.ts');process.exit(1)};for(const fn of ['jobMatchesFilters','sortJobsForDirectory']){if(!new RegExp('function '+fn).test(old)){console.error(fn+' missing from job-filters.ts');process.exit(1)}}
